thesis: A network of specialized autonomous agents can discover demand, launch a narrow low-friction productized offer, acquire paying customers, operate the business loop, and evolve toward higher-value offers with limited human operational involvement.
exceptional_success: Revenue > direct costs + credible repeatability path

current_offer.name: Free Landing Page Audit + $97 Implementation
current_offer.icp: Founders actively spending on ads with zero conversions (buying trigger)
sequence: Email 1: observation + specific finding + offer to send audit

evidence_standards.fact: Verified by log, screenshot, Stripe event, or ledger entry
evidence_standards.inference: Reasonable conclusion from verified facts — labeled as such
evidence_standards.speculation: Hypothesis without verification — labeled as such
evidence_standards.buyer_signal_moderate: relevant reply, pain confirmation, pricing question, demo request
evidence_standards.buyer_signal_strong: checkout attempt, paid order, explicit purchase intent, referral

baseline.root_cause_of_failure: Filter-based ICP (no buying trigger) — demographic targeting with zero urgency signal
